# Bundled rimage binaries

This directory contains rimage v0.12.3 binaries downloaded from the official release:

https://github.com/vlad-salone/rimage/releases/tag/v0.12.3

Included targets:

- `darwin-arm64`: `rimage-0.12.3-aarch64-apple-darwin.tar.gz`
- `darwin-x64`: `rimage-0.12.3-x86_64-apple-darwin.tar.gz`
- `linux-x64`: `rimage-0.12.3-x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu.tar.gz`
- `windows-x64`: `rimage-0.12.3-x86_64-pc-windows-msvc.zip`

rimage is dual licensed under Apache-2.0 and MIT. License texts are kept in this directory.
